legal.content: ClickNest is committed to protecting your privacy. This page provides details on how we handle data and user information professionally and securely.

privacy.s1Content: We collect information that you provide directly to us when you fill out forms on our website or communicate with us.
privacy.s2Content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, and to communicate with you about your projects.
privacy.s3Content: We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access.

terms.s1Content: By accessing our website, you agree to be bound by these terms of service and all applicable laws and regulations.
terms.s2Content: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on ClickNest's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
terms.s3Content: The materials on ClickNest's website are provided on an 'as is' basis. ClickNest makes no warranties, expressed or implied.
